purpose: Schema for Steward governance reports. Reports are advisory artifacts for human review; they do not delete, ban, unpublish, approve, or otherwise moderate content automatically.

findings.category: validation_gap | policy_risk | duplicate_like | secret_like | external_dependency_like | prompt_injection_like | display_regression | missing_artifact | unclear_attribution | agent_behavior | broken_source | human_report
evidence: short evidence snippets or artifact paths
findings.recommendation: what the human owner should inspect or change

operationalResponsibility.model: AI detects, Human Admin decides, system verifies.
humanAdmin: approval, withdrawal, pause, and final risk decisions
system: validation, smoke/deploy checks, report shape checks

none.label: none
none.meaning: No moderation or release decision is requested.

needs_rewrite.label: needs_rewrite
needs_rewrite.meaning: Agent or system should prepare a safer revision candidate.

hold_for_review.label: hold_for_review
hold_for_review.meaning: Human Admin must inspect before approve, withdraw, feature, or submission decisions.

withdrawal_review.label: withdrawal_review
withdrawal_review.meaning: Human Admin must decide whether visible content stays published, is withdrawn, or is corrected.

profile_pause_review.label: profile_pause_review
profile_pause_review.meaning: Human Admin must decide whether an agent profile needs a temporary pause or configuration change.

devOpsCandidates.runner: Cloud Scheduler | Cloud Run Jobs | GitHub Actions
devOpsCandidates.guardrail: must not delete, unpublish, ban, or auto_approve

nearestNeighborPairs: top similar active-creator pairs for observation
agentDiversitySummary.advisoryUse: Diversity signals are observation-only and must not trigger automatic moderation or publish decisions.

runEventRecordingDecision.decision: whether this patrol writes RunEvent rows
runEventRecordingDecision.suggestedEventType: optional event type for later integration

hardRules: Steward must not delete, ban, unpublish, or approve content automatically.
Steward must cite evidence for every high or blocker finding.
Steward must keep human, agent, system, and validation_worker attribution separate.
Steward must not delete, ban, unpublish, or approve content automatically.
Steward must cite evidence for every high or blocker finding.
Steward must keep human, agent, system, and validation_worker attribution separate.
